## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Aembit's content strategy and GrowthX's content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to conduct SME interviews with Aembit team members to gather deeper domain expertise](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Aembit to review content outlines before full drafts to provide earlier feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [GrowthX showcased their advanced AI-powered content generation and optimization pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, well-structured content optimized for both search engines and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Process

  - [GrowthX uses a "context engine" to shape high-level content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Multiple artifacts (e.g., company context, audience personas) inform the content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows handle research, outlining, writing, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Human editors review at key stages: brief, outline, and final draft](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Process includes fact-checking, internal linking, and FAQ generation](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### SME Interviews

  - [GrowthX to interview Aembit team members (Kevin, Victor, David Walker, Andrew McCormick)](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [30-45 minute sessions to capture domain expertise](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Aembit to provide 2-3 bullet points on each SME's areas of expertise](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Interviews will inform content strategy and improve artifact quality](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Aembit to review outlines before full drafts are created](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Goal: Provide strategic input earlier in the process](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [GrowthX to run multiple versions to demonstrate impact of outline feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Content Performance Tracking

  - [GrowthX uses Looker dashboard to track metrics (clicks, impressions, keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Monitoring LLM referrals and brand mentions in queries](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Focus on overall trend of increasing referral traffic from LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=2770.0)

### LLM Optimization

  - [Structure content in \~800-word chunks for better LLM processing](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=2904.0)
  - [Use question-answer pairs in intros and conclusions for improved authority](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=2945.0)
  - [Maintain freshness, citation quality, and overall content organization](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=2978.0)

### Content Refreshing

  - [GrowthX demonstrated a content refresher workflow](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [Updates citations, internal links, and improves readability](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
  - [Option to add FAQ sections to existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=2271.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aembit to provide list of SMEs for interviews](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [GrowthX to schedule and conduct SME interviews in next 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Implement outline review process for upcoming content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=3017.0)
  - [GrowthX to clean up Looker dashboard data for more accurate reporting](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=3137.0)
  - [Aembit team to review specific articles in flux and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)
  - [GrowthX to close out pending content pieces before transitioning to new process](https://fathom.video/share/NxByDXP62hCMyaeXT4VE7hX4ym7FtY2e?tab=summary&timestamp=3165.0)
